PROP-01b-partial1-pre-005.text: isValidSignature must reject orders with sellAmount exceeding contract balance.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-005.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.sellAmount <= balanceOf(this); else revert InsufficientBalance

PROP-01b-partial1-pre-006.text: isValidSignature must reject expired orders where validTo < block.timestamp.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-006.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.validTo >= block.timestamp; else revert ExpiredOrder

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-010.text: isValidSignature must enforce feeAmount == 0, kind == KIND_SELL, partiallyFillable == true.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-010.assertion: forall isValidSignature: order.feeAmount==0 AND order.kind==SELL AND order.partiallyFillable==true

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-011.text: isValidSignature must enforce both sellTokenBalance and buyTokenBalance are BALANCE_ERC20.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-011.assertion: forall isValidSignature: order.sellTokenBalance==ERC20 AND order.buyTokenBalance==ERC20; else revert

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-012.text: Vault relayer approval must equal full contract balance on auction start and be revoked to zero on end.

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-013.text: Vault relayer approval during live auction must not exceed auctioned asset balance at approval time.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-013.assertion: forall _onAuctionStart(asset): approval(relayer) == balanceOf(this,asset) at time of call

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-014.text: Remaining vault relayer approval after partial bids may exceed remaining balance, enabling solver overdraft.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-014.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt): approval(relayer) set at start >= balance_after_bid => solver can pull excess via approval

PROP-01b-partial1-pre-007.text: performUpkeep must revert if auction already live for an asset (prevent double-start).

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-015.text: checkUpkeep iterates all allowlisted assets; unbounded asset count may exceed block gas limit.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-015.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): gas_consumed(loop) < block.gasLimit for all possible s_allowlistedAssets sizes

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-016.text: No new auctions start when assetOut price feed is invalid (isAssetOutPriceValid == false).
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-016.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): !isAssetOutPriceValid => eligibleAssetsIdx = 0 (no new auctions returned)

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-017.text: Ended auctions can still be processed even when assetOut price feed is invalid.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-017.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): !isAssetOutPriceValid => endedAuctions list unaffected by price validity

PROP-01b-partial1-pre-008.text: performUpkeep must reject assets with usdValue below minAuctionSizeUsd to prevent dust auctions.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-008.assertion: forall performUpkeep(eligible): usdValue(asset) >= minAuctionSizeUsd; else revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize

PROP-01b-partial1-post-001.text: After _onAuctionEnd, vault relayer approval must be exactly zero and remaining assets transferred out.
PROP-01b-partial1-post-001.assertion: forall _onAuctionEnd(asset): post: allowance(relayer)==0 AND balance(asset)==0 (transferred to receiver)

PROP-01b-partial1-post-002.text: After performUpkeep starts auction, s_auctionStarts[asset] must equal block.timestamp exactly.
PROP-01b-partial1-post-002.assertion: forall performUpkeep(eligible): post: s_auctionStarts[asset] == block.timestamp for each started asset

PROP-01b-partial1-post-003.text: After bid() completes, s_entered must be reset to false regardless of callback success or failure.
PROP-01b-partial1-post-003.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): post: s_entered == false (reset in all execution paths)

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-023.text: isValidSignature must reject orders for assets without active auctions (auctionStart == 0).

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-024.text: isValidSignature must reject orders where auction has expired (elapsedTime > auctionDuration).
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-024.assertion: forall isValidSignature: block.timestamp - auctionStart > auctionDuration => revert InvalidAuction

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-001.text: auctionCallback must reject calls where msg.sender is not the stored auction contract.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-001.assertion: forall call auctionCallback(from, assetIn, amountIn, assetOut, amountOut, data): msg.sender == address(s_auction)

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-002.text: auctionCallback must reject calls where from is not address(this).
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-002.assertion: forall call auctionCallback(from, ...): from == address(this) OR revert

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-003.text: _multiCall in auctionCallback must not allow transferring contract token balances to arbitrary addresses.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-003.assertion: forall solution in auctionCallback: no _call(target, data) where data encodes transfer(attacker, amount) on held tokens

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-004.text: Solution _multiCall must not approve contract tokens to addresses other than the auction contract.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-004.assertion: forall _call in auctionCallback._multiCall: if target is ERC20 and data encodes approve(spender, amt) then spender == s_auction

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-005.text: Reentrancy via _multiCall must not allow bid() to be re-entered during auctionCallback execution.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-005.assertion: forall bid() execution: no reentrant call to bid() via auctionCallback._multiCall path

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-006.text: forceApprove amount in bid() no-solution path must equal getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp).
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-006.assertion: bid(assetIn, amount, []) => approvedAmount == getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp)

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-007.text: _multiCall targets must not include AuctionBidder itself to prevent self-callback reentrancy loops.

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-008.text: forceApprove after _multiCall in auctionCallback must approve exact amountOut to msg.sender (auction).
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-008.assertion: auctionCallback post-multiCall: forceApprove(msg.sender, amountOut) where msg.sender == s_auction

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-009.text: Leftover assetOut after bid must be forwarded to receiver if receiver != address(0).
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-009.assertion: post bid(): s_receiver != address(0) AND assetOutBalance > 0 => safeTransfer(s_receiver, assetOutBalance)

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-010.text: If receiver is address(0), leftover assetOut tokens must remain in contract after bid.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-010.assertion: post bid(): s_receiver == address(0) => no safeTransfer of assetOut AND tokens remain in contract

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-011.text: Failed external calls in _call must always revert, never return silently.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-011.assertion: forall _call(target, data): success == false => revert (never return empty)

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-012.text: Empty calls array in _multiCall must revert with EmptyList().

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-013.text: returnData.length must equal calls.length on successful _multiCall completion.

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-014.text: _call must forward exact calldata to target without modification.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-014.assertion: forall _call(target, data): target receives data unmodified

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-015.text: Original revert reason from external call must be preserved when response.length > 0.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-015.assertion: _call: success == false AND response.length > 0 => revert(response) preserves original reason

PROP-01b-partial2-pre-001.text: bid() must enforce AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE and whenNotPaused before execution.

PROP-01b-partial2-post-001.text: Changing auction via _setAuction must not leave stale token approvals to the old auction contract.
PROP-01b-partial2-post-001.assertion: post _setAuction(newAuction): allowance(address(this), oldAuction) == 0 for all tokens

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-017.text: All _multiCall calls must execute sequentially in order 0..calls.length-1.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-017.assertion: _multiCall(calls): execution order is calls[0], calls[1], ..., calls[n-1] strictly sequential

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-018.text: If any _call in _multiCall reverts, entire _multiCall must revert with no partial execution returned.

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-019.text: Solution with non-empty data must be abi.encoded as Call[] before passing to _multiCall.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-019.assertion: auctionCallback: calls = abi.decode(data, (Call[])) must succeed or revert

PROP-01b-partial2-inv-020.text: No-solution bid path must use forceApprove to set exact approval without residual allowance from prior bids.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-020.assertion: bid(solution=[]) => forceApprove resets to 0 then sets getAssetOutAmount, no residual allowance

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-001.text: Reentrancy guard must prevent recursive bid() calls via s_entered flag.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-001.assertion: forall call bid(): s_entered == true during execution => recursive bid() reverts

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-002.text: Bidder callback cannot re-enter isValidSignature during bid() execution.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-002.assertion: forall bid(cb): s_entered == true => isValidSignature() reverts ReentrantCall

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-003.text: LINK payment is always pulled from bidder AFTER callback execution completes.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-003.assertion: forall bid(cb): safeTransferFrom(bidder, assetOut) executes strictly after auctionCallback returns

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-004.text: Bid amount must not exceed available auction balance for the asset.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-004.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount): amount <= balanceOf(this, asset)

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-005.text: All rounding in getAssetOutAmount must favor the protocol (round up asset out).
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-005.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount(): mulDivUp used for all USD and token conversions

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-006.text: Price multiplier bounded: endingPriceMultiplier <= multiplier <= startingPriceMultiplier.

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-007.text: isValidSignature buyAmount must meet current auction price curve minimum.

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-008.text: isValidSignature receiver must be the auction contract itself.

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-009.text: isValidSignature buyToken must equal configured assetOut (LINK).

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-010.text: CowSwap orders must be sell-kind, partially fillable, zero-fee, and ERC20 balance type.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-010.assertion: forall isValidSignature(o): o.kind==SELL AND o.partiallyFillable AND o.feeAmount==0 AND o.balanceERC20

PROP-01b-partial3-inv-011.text: isValidSignature sellAmount must not exceed contract's asset balance.
